chapter_title.en: Chapter on Miscellaneous Matters Related to Testimonies

text: 3366 - وَ قِيلَ لِلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ إِنَّ شَرِيكاً يَرُدُّ شَهَادَتَنَا فَقَالَ "لاَ تُذِلُّوا أَنْفُسَكُمْ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3366 - It was said to Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), "Sharik rejects our testimony.".
Imam (as) replied: "Do not humiliate yourselves."
